# Used Car Dealer / Auto Trader Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-used-car-dealer-used-car-dealer-site  
**Vertical slug:** used-car-dealer  
**Niche family:** NF-COM-AUT (anchor)  
**Family role:** anchor (variants: spare-parts, tyre-shop, car-wash, motorcycle-accessories)  
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's used car market is one of the largest in Africa, with an estimated 400,000+ vehicles imported annually. The majority are "Tokunbo" (foreign-used) vehicles from the US, UK, and Belgium via Cotonou (Benin Republic). Key markets: Berger Motor Market (Lagos), Ladipo (Lagos, also spare parts), Wuse Motor Park (Abuja), Zaria Road motor market (Kano). Prices range from ₦1.5M (2010 Toyota Corolla) to ₦35M+ (2020 Toyota Land Cruiser). Key trust signals: VIN verification, customs duty clearance, NCS (Nigerian Customs Service) papers, FRSC clearance, "Grade A" condition certification. Most dealers use Instagram and Jiji.ng but few have professional websites.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
**Persona A — Emeka Oduya, 36, Lagos**: Professional looking for a reliable Tokunbo Toyota Camry (2015–2018) within ₦4M–₦7M. Wants to verify dealer authenticity, see car photos, and check customs papers before visiting.
**Persona B — Alhaji Sani Aliyu, 50, Kano**: Fleet buyer for a logistics company, purchasing 5 Nissan Hiace vans. Needs bulk pricing and bulk customs clearance support.
**Persona C — Mrs Tolu Adeleke, 42, Abuja**: First-time car buyer wanting guidance on what to look for, Tokunbo grades, and how to avoid fraud. Appreciates educational content.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
**Home:** Hero (dealer name, "Trusted Tokunbo Cars. Verified & Cleared." tagline, WhatsApp enquiry CTA), featured cars grid (with prices in ₦, year, mileage), trust strip (NCS clearance, FRSC papers, years in business, VIN check offered), finance/hire-purchase note.
**About:** Dealer story, yard location (Berger/Abuja/Kano), import process, customs clearance service.
**Stock:** Vehicle listings (make, model, year, mileage, price in ₦, WhatsApp to inspect).
**Contact:** WhatsApp inspection appointment, yard address, drive-to directions, NDPR form.

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Trustworthy, transparent, knowledgeable. "No surprises. Just good cars." Education builds trust — explain Tokunbo grades (A, B, C), customs clearance, FRSC papers. Primary CTA: "WhatsApp to Inspect." Acknowledge the fear of fraud — counter it with transparency (VIN check, customs papers shown). Nigerian English.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
NCS customs clearance certificate; FRSC road worthiness; VIN verification service offered; years in business; cars sold count; dealer association membership (MVADOP, ADVAN); CAC registration; testimonials (Emeka, Alhaji Sani, Mrs Tolu); prices in ₦; accepted payments: bank transfer, Paystack, instalment/hire-purchase options noted.

## 6. Image Direction
1. Clean Tokunbo Toyota Corolla on a Lagos motor yard with clear blue sky — dealer logo visible in background.
2. Salesperson showing NCS customs papers and FRSC certificate to a customer — trust-building documentation.
3. Wide shot of busy Berger Motor Market — hundreds of cars, buyers inspecting, realistic Nigerian context.
4. Mechanic inspecting car undercarriage at yard — pre-sale quality check process.
5. Key handover — smiling buyer receiving car keys from dealer, both in shot.
6. WhatsApp conversation screen: buyer sending enquiry, dealer responding with car photos.
7. Fleet of branded cars at a large Abuja dealer lot — size and legitimacy signal.

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
NCS: customs duty must be paid; clearance certificate required and should be shown to buyers. FRSC: road worthiness certificate. CAC: business registration. FCCPC: consumer rights — 30-day implied warranty on mechanical faults for formal dealers. Hire-purchase: CBN consumer credit rules apply if offering finance. NDPR: contact forms.

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
| Requirement | Status |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp CTA home + contact | ✅ REQUIRED |
| All prices in ₦ | ✅ REQUIRED (₦1.5M–₦35M+ range) |
| Nigerian cities | ✅ Lagos (Berger), Abuja (Wuse), Kano |
| NCS/FRSC trust signals | ✅ REQUIRED |
| Paystack / bank transfer | ✅ REQUIRED |
| Mobile-first 375px | ✅ REQUIRED |
| NDPR consent | ✅ REQUIRED |
